message.content: Curated JSONL replay fixture: repository triage. Synthetic data only; no private transcript content.
Review the QA fixture index and identify one missing runtime coverage row.
Runtime coverage index includes basic channel and model rows.
The index has channel and model rows; runtime replay coverage is a good follow-up.
Draft the smallest next test without editing production wiring.
Add a fixture-only replay test and leave CLI wiring for the parent branch.
